# ADR Index

| ADR | Title | Status | Supersedes | Superseded By | Source Change | Date |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ADR-0001 | Use Independent agent-flow Scaffold | Accepted | none | none | starter | 2026-06-10 |

## Status Values

```text
Proposed | Accepted | Deprecated | Superseded
```

## Maintenance

- Add every ADR when it is created.
- Update `Status` when an ADR is accepted, deprecated, or superseded.
- Fill `Supersedes` / `Superseded By` when one ADR replaces another.
- Keep the full rationale in the ADR file; keep this index short.
